comments.author: @PlanetVista4K
comments.text:
Thank you for discovering Cyprus with us — a forgotten island paradise of the Mediterranean 🌊
If you enjoyed the journey, please like, share, and subscribe!
👉 Where should we travel next?

replies.author: @elenakatsantoni7269
replies.text: Thank you for this amazing video of Cyprus. Great work. I have subscribed to you channel. Please note that from 52 min onwards when you are showing Kakopetria village there are some photos which are not of the island of Cyprus. Letting you know in case you would like to correct it.

comments.author: @constantinazakou8581
comments.text: i am a cypriot and some visuals of this video doesnt belong to cyprus , or its AI or its not corresponding at the location written. Furthermore , the illegaly occupied north part of cyprus is a de facto state , globally not recognize so tourist should know this information. in a lot of parts of this video, the way the infos are presented and described are deceiving or inaccurate. Also there are hundreds of other things to eat other than fried calamari that 99% is frozen. also i believe you are not capable to make the distinction between a turkish cypriot from a turkish settler. Cyprus is not forgotten because your geographical knowledge is limited and when it used to be forgotten it was really a paradise. Now the island is exploited by everyone like russians, isrealis , turks, british, americans with the help of our politicians and some locals who profit on this ecocide. Of course Cyprus is still magnificent and extremely beautiful especially for a foreigner but this video gives an inaccurate or one sided  and shallow impression

replies.author: @PlanetVista4K
replies.text: Thank you for your detailed and passionate feedback. It's incredibly valuable to hear from a local, and your insights will help me be more thorough and accurate in my research for future videos.

comments.author: @yiannosphiniotis
comments.text: You didn't show the second biggest Greek Cypriot city of Cyprus which is Limassol in the south side of Cyprus. comments.text: You forgot to mention that the northern part of Cyprus is illegally occupied by Turkey. Turkey also displaced the turkish Cypriots and moved them in the northern part of Cyprus to also occupy the land and homes of the Greek Cypriots. The northern part of Cyprus is illegal. comments.author: @stevejaques9524
comments.text:
I love Cyprus dearly, and these videos are great for showing those who have never been what they’re missing. 

But, I’m getting sick of watching this sort of AI generated pulp that just goes unchecked and manages to get so much wrong every time. Cars driving in the wrong side of the road, a Cyprus warbler disguised as a blue tit, a festival in Montenegro and so much else that just isn’t true.

I really want to love this video but I just can’t even finish it.

replies.author: @PlanetVista4K
replies.text: I appreciate you pointing out these inaccuracies, and I will be more diligent in fact-checking the visual details in my future documentaries!
